issues.sample: McLaren automotive has a known suspension accumulator problem on earlier year 720s models. This is a major safety concern as the suspension is a huge safety component in all vehicles. They have a revised updated part to fix this, but it has not yet issued a recall to have the man

narrative.headline: What 2019 Mclaren 720s owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Suspension (100% of reports).
